mapping_fields.varika_word: The word as it appears in MAM, with shewa+varika
mapping_fields.xataf_word: The word with the explicit hataf vowel
mapping_fields.match_kind: How the extraction matched: 'sigla=word', 'bare-word', or with '+joined' suffix
mapping_fields.sigla: Manuscript sigla before the = sign (e.g. 'א', 'ל,ל1', 'א(ס),ל,ק3'). Individual sigla may have ? (uncertain) or ! (surprising) suffixes (e.g. 'ל,ק3?' means ק3 is uncertain).
mapping_fields.neither-lc-nor-ac-mentioned: Present (true) only when sigla mentions neither LC (ל) nor AC (א).
mapping_fields.varika-count: Present only when the word has more than one varika (implicit default: 1). E.g. Judges 7:7 has 2.
mapping_fields.non-inferrable: Present (true) only when the xataf vowel cannot be inferred from the varika word by standard rules.

failure_fields.varika_word: The word as it appears in MAM, with shewa+varika
failure_fields.reason: Short classification of why extraction failed
failure_fields.arg1_strings: Raw string fragments from the nusach note's second argument
